ddls:
CREATE TABLE "modules" (
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each module */,
  "module_name" TEXT /* Name of the module (e.g., A1, A2, B1) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the module */,
  "stage_order" INTEGER /* Order of the module in the lifecycle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "category_name" TEXT /* Name of the category (e.g., Admixture, Coarse Aggregate) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent category (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product (e.g., xyz Admix, Gravel) */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the category the product belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product */,
  "manufacturer" TEXT /* Manufacturer of the product */,
  "supplier" TEXT /* Supplier of the product */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lifecycle_activities" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lifecycle activity */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product the activity is associated with */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module the activity belongs to */,
  "activity_description" TEXT /* Description of the lifecycle activity */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the activity */,
  "units" TEXT /* Units of the value */,
  "impact_per_unit" REAL /* Impact per unit of the activity */,
  "min_impact" REAL /* Minimum impact of the activity */,
  "geo_mean" REAL /* Geometric mean impact of the activity */,
  "max_impact" REAL /* Maximum impact of the activity */,
  "geo_mean_rel" TEXT /* Relative geometric mean impact of the activity */,
  "activity_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity took place */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lifecycle_activities_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "geographic_regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each geographic region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the geographic region (e.g., RER, US-CO) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the geographic region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent where the region is located */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., environmental analyst, product manager, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lifecycle activity being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the activity */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the activity was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the activity */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_activity_id FOREIGN KEY ("activity_id") REFERENCES lifecycle_activities ("activity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_region" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lifecycle activity */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the geographic region */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id", "region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "activity_modules" (
  "activity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the lifecycle activity */,
  "module_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the module */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("activity_id", "module_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role the permission is associated with */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)
